title: Greater Bundahishn: The Full Creation Account
description: The complete Zoroastrian creation narrative: Ohrmazd creates the world in six stages over 6,000 years, while Ahriman plots its destruction.
introduction: The complete Zoroastrian creation narrative: Ohrmazd creates the world in six stages over 6,000 years, while Ahriman plots its destruction.

translation.original_text: Ohrmazd was on high in omniscience and goodness. Ahriman was deep in the darkness of ignorance and desire to destroy.
